day3_morning_start.name: 私
day3_morning_start.text: *3日目。昨夜の夢のせいか、すっきりしない。*

day3_morning_2.name: 私
day3_morning_2.text: *学校に着いた。今日はセアが待っていない。……それがかえって気になる。*

day3_morning_3.name: 私
day3_morning_3.text: *I couldn't sleep properly after waking up in the early hours. My eyes feel dry.*

day3_morning_4.name: 私
day3_morning_4.text: *I looked in the mirror. My complexion is off. Dark circles under my eyes.*

day3_morning_5.name: 私
day3_morning_5.text: *...It's only been 3 days since I transferred and I already look like this.*

day3_morning_milk.name: 私
day3_morning_milk.text: *I open the refrigerator to have breakfast and... something is off. The milk I bought yesterday is there. But the position has changed.*

day3_morning_milk_2.name: 私
day3_morning_milk_2.text: *...Did I move it? Must just be tired. I brush it off.*

day3_morning_gate_3.name: 私
day3_morning_gate_3.text: *...That actually bothers me more. Yesterday she was waiting even 10 minutes early. What's different today?*

day3_morning_hallway.name: 私
day3_morning_hallway.text: *廊下を歩いていて下駄箱の前で立ち止まる。何かが目に入った。*

day3_morning_locker.name: 私
day3_morning_locker.text: *ロッカーの一つに名前が削り取られて消されている。跡だけが残っていて……誰かがわざと消したようだ。*

day3_morning_locker_2.name: 私
day3_morning_locker_2.text: *ロッカーの中をそっと開けてみた。空っぽだ。でも隅に何か……写真の断片？ 半分に切られた証明写真。*

day3_morning_locker_3.name: 私
day3_morning_locker_3.text: *……何だこれ。ポケットに入れておく。後でじっくり見よう。*

day3_morning_locker_4.name: 私
day3_morning_locker_4.text: *But in the corner, something... a photo fragment? A passport photo cut in half.*

day3_morning_photo.name: 私
day3_morning_photo.text: *Only half a face remains. I can't tell who it is. ...Why was this cut?*

day3_morning_photo_2.name: 私
day3_morning_photo_2.text: *I put the photo in my pocket. For some reason... it felt wrong to throw it away.*

day3_morning_seolhwa.name: 私
day3_morning_seolhwa.text: *I turned down the corridor heading to class.*

day3_morning_seolhwa_2.name: 私
day3_morning_seolhwa_2.text: *...Someone is standing at the end of the corridor.*

day3_morning_seolhwa_3.name: 私
day3_morning_seolhwa_3.text: *A pale face. Eyes gazing into the distance. Looking at me.*

day3_morning_seolhwa_4.name: 私
day3_morning_seolhwa_4.text: *It's Seolhwa. I'm certain. This time she doesn't disappear. My heart pounds. ...I try moving closer.*

day3_morning_seolhwa_5.name: 私
day3_morning_seolhwa_5.text: *One step. Two steps. With every step I take, the corridor seems to grow longer. My footsteps echo. Seolhwa's mouth moves.*

day3_morning_seolhwa_gone.name: 私
day3_morning_seolhwa_gone.text: *The first time I've heard Seolhwa's voice. Small and trembling, but... clear. 'Not yet'?*

day3_morning_seolhwa_gone_2.name: 私
day3_morning_seolhwa_gone_2.text: *I blinked and she was gone. Only I remain in the corridor. Nobody here.*

day3_morning_seolhwa_gone_3.name: 私
day3_morning_seolhwa_gone_3.text: *...I definitely heard a voice just now. She said 'not yet.' What does it mean? Don't come yet? Then when?*

day3_morning_cherry.name: 私
day3_morning_cherry.text: *Something on the floor. The spot where Seolhwa was standing. ...A single cherry blossom petal.*

day3_morning_cherry_2.name: 私
day3_morning_cherry_2.text: *I pick it up and look. A real cherry blossom petal. But... this isn't cherry blossom season. There are no cherry blossoms on campus. Where did this come from?*

day3_morning_classroom.name: 私
day3_morning_classroom.text: *教室に入った。雰囲気がおかしい。生徒たちが自分を見る目が……昨日と違う。*

day3_morning_class_2.name: 私
day3_morning_class_2.text: *何か話していたのに、自分が入った途端に口を閉じた。何の話をしていたんだ？*

day3_morning_class_3.name: 担任教師
day3_morning_class_3.text: "{name}、今日はちょっと疲れて見えるわね。昨夜はよく眠れた？"

day3_morning_class_4.name: 私
day3_morning_class_4.text: *……よく眠れなかったことをどうして知っているんだ？ 目の下がちょっとくすんでいるのか。それとも……本当に監視されているわけじゃないよな。*

day3_morning_class_sea.name: 私
day3_morning_class_sea.text: *セアが席に座っている。いつものように笑っているけど……何かが違う。口元だけが笑っている。*

day3_morning_class_reply.name: 私
day3_morning_class_reply.text: *...Can she see at a glance that I didn't sleep well? Well, with dark circles like this, of course she can.*

day3_morning_class_sea_sleep.name: ハン・セア
day3_morning_class_sea_sleep.text: "Your color looks off. Didn't sleep well last night?"

day3_morning_class_eunsu.name: パク・ウンス
day3_morning_class_eunsu.text: "{name}, you look a bit tired today. Did you sleep well?"

day3_morning_class_eunsu_2.name: 私
day3_morning_class_eunsu_2.text: *I guess my face really does look that bad.*

day3_morning_class_eunsu_3.name: パク・ウンス
day3_morning_class_eunsu_3.text: "Is that so? It's fine to doze during class if you're short on sleep. It's the first week, so it's an adjustment period."

day3_morning_class_eunsu_4.name: 私
day3_morning_class_eunsu_4.text: *The teacher smiles and turns away. ...It's a kind thing to say but for some reason it feels uncomfortable.*

day3_morning_pencil.name: 私
day3_morning_pencil.text: *Sitting down and opening the desk drawer... the pencil case I left yesterday has been moved.*

day3_morning_pencil_2.name: 私
day3_morning_pencil_2.text: *I definitely put it on the left, but it's on the right now. The order of pencils inside is different too.*

day3_morning_pencil_3.name: 私
day3_morning_pencil_3.text: *...Did someone go through it? Or did the student on cleaning duty touch it? ...It's not a big deal, but I feel a bit unsettled.*

day3_morning_end.name: 私
day3_morning_end.text: *授業が始まる。集中しようとしても頭の中がごちゃごちゃだ。*
